title: Providing amounts for the expenses of the Committee on House Administration in the One Hundred Nineteenth Congress.
plain_summary: This bill gives money to a special group in Congress called the Committee on House Administration. The committee will get almost seventeen million dollars to pay for their work. The money will be split up over two years. The committee has to follow certain rules about how they can spend this money.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.

sections.title: Section 1 Amounts for Committee Expenses
sections.text: The Committee on House Administration will be given money to pay for its work during the One Hundred Nineteenth Congress. This includes paying all staff salaries and other costs. The total amount will be no more than sixteen million eight hundred eighty five thousand four hundred forty six dollars. This money will come from the House of Representatives accounts that are set aside for committee salaries and expenses.

sections.title: Section 2 Session Limitations
sections.text: The money from Section 1 will be split into two parts. The first part is no more than eight million thirty one thousand five hundred twenty three dollars. This money can be used from noon on January third two thousand twenty five until just before noon on January third two thousand twenty six. The second part is no more than eight million eight hundred fifty three thousand nine hundred twenty three dollars. This money can be used from noon on January third two thousand twenty six until just before noon on January third two thousand twenty seven.

sections.title: Section 3 Vouchers
sections.text: Before any money can be paid out under this resolution, the Committee must follow a specific process. The Committee must authorize payment through a voucher (a written request for payment). The Chairman of the Committee must sign this voucher. The Committee on House Administration must approve the payment in whatever way they decide.

sections.title: Section 4 Regulations
sections.text: All money given under this resolution must be spent according to the rules set by the Committee on House Administration. The Committee will write these rules to control how the money can be used.
